one_time_description: Earnings from investment in Nation business entities (modified equity) - significantly higher than prior year due to Chu Cho Forestry LP and Chu Cho Industries LP earnings
economic_notes: Nation and McLeod Lake Indian Band entered into letter of intent with Canfor Corporation to purchase Canfor's Mackenzie site, plant and equipment post year-end; refundable deposit of $3,000,000 made in May 2022. Nation operates Ingenika Trading Post (retail). Multiple forestry, environmental and industrial partnerships including Chu Cho Forestry LP, Chu Cho Industries LP, Chu Cho Environmental LP, Tse Keh Nay LLP.
notes: Financial statements are restated (Note 22) - prior year comparatives restated and accumulated surplus restated due to correction of errors totalling $16,911,367. Prior year audit was performed by a different firm. 11 GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. 5 entities fully consolidated including Ingenika Trading Post, 0882074 B.C. Ltd., Ingenika Logging Ltd., Tsay Keh Dene Settlement Negotiations Agreement, and Tsay Keh Dene Treaty Society. Victoria Foundation endowment of $16,065,948 held in perpetuity is NOT recorded in the financial statements. Tangible capital asset net book value not extractable from text provided (Schedule 1 not fully included). Total government transfers estimated as ISC + FNHA + Province of BC + BCTC + FNESC + BC Gaming = 6,936,346 + 5,667,460 + 2,035,179 + 620,000 + 763,794 + 348,057 + 6,823,538 (BC Hydro treated as government transfer) = amounts vary depending on BC Hydro classification.
